The agent is at the start of the episode with a goal distance of 2021 cm and a bearing of +26 degrees. I need to calibrate the bearing sign convention first. According to skill #6, I should execute a deliberate test turn to understand how the bearing value changes. Since the bearing is positive (+26), I'll start by turning left to see if the bearing decreases (which would mean left turns reduce positive bearing) or increases.

Let me turn left first to calibrate the bearing convention.
</think>

<tool_call>
<function=TURN_LEFT>
</function>
</tool_call>
